svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 758px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 5px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: MCU開発用ロジックアナライザー選定レポート (予算3万円以下 / Mac M4環境)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(247, 250, 252), rgb(20, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(160, 174, 192), rgb(79, 91, 107));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 150px; margin-left: 16px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1a202c;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a202c, #ced3de); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
前提条件・ターゲット
---------------------------
● Host: Mac Mini (M4/Apple Silicon)
● Target: STM32, ESP32, Arduino
● Proto: SPI, I2C, UART
● Budget: 30,000円以下
● 国内購入 (Amazon/秋月等)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(235, 244, 255), rgb(21, 29, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(49, 130, 206), rgb(75, 145, 210));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 135px; margin-left: 255px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #2c5282;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#2c5282, #8fafd9); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
【推奨 No.1】Kingst LA2016
実勢価格: 約2.7万円
---------------------------
● 200MHz / 16ch / 128MBメモリ
● ハードウェアバッファ搭載で安定
● 高速SPI解析に最適 (Best Performance)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 255, 244), rgb(12, 25, 16)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(56, 161, 105), rgb(54, 144, 96));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 265px; margin-left: 255px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #276749;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#276749, #79b097); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
【コスパ】Kingst LA1010
実勢価格: 約1.3万円
---------------------------
● 100MHz (Max) / 16ch
● I2C/UART/低速SPIに十分
● バッファなし (USB依存)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 255, 244), rgb(12, 25, 16)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(56, 161, 105), rgb(54, 144, 96));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 380px; margin-left: 255px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #276749;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#276749, #79b097); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
【入門用】汎用 24MHz 8ch
実勢価格: 約1,500円
---------------------------
● 24MHz / 8ch (FX2チップ)
● 圧倒的安価、学習用に最適
● 高速信号は不可

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 240), rgb(20, 20, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 158, 46), rgb(143, 95, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 125px; margin-left: 545px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #744210;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#744210, #d3a87d); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Mac環境の注意点
● Kingst純正ソフト: Rosetta 2で動作
● オープンソース: Sigrok / PulseView推奨
● Windows専用機(Zeroplus等)は避ける

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 215, 215), rgb(71, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(229, 62, 62), rgb(255, 123, 123));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 240px; margin-left: 545px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #9b2c2c;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#9b2c2c, #fe9f9f); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
安全対策 (推奨)
● USBアイソレーター (¥1,600~)
● Mac本体を高電圧・ノイズから保護
● 特にESP32等の高電力MCUで必須

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 340px; margin-left: 545px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #4a5568;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#4a5568, #9ca6b6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
非推奨モデル
● DSLogic Plus (Macでバグ報告あり)
● Zeroplus LAP-C (Win専用)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 758px; height: 1px; padding-top: 470px; margin-left: 5px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 結論: 本格開発には LA2016、コスト重視なら LA1010 を推奨。Mac保護のためUSBアイソレーターの同時購入を強く推奨。
